_doc: Copy to telemetry.json and set results_dir to your run folder (relative paths → this JSON directory).
"interactive": true|false or legacy "show" forces matplotlib window even when saving; omit → window only when no save_dir.
time_range [t0, t1]: seconds inclusive; omit or null for full run.
Agent fields: map_frontier_length, map_size, land_set_length, fuel_consumed, behavior_aggressiveness, ...
Use aggregate: mean on agents series to average the listed agents.
Per-figure subplot_layout overrides: set figure.subplot_layout to horizontal | vertical
